reviews.comment:
Baños limpios pero queríamos cambiar al bebé y en el baño no había cambiador,al menos de mujeres y al preguntar a la empleada si había en el baño de personas discapacitadas (ya que estaba cerrado con llave ) de muy mala gana contestó "creo que no"
Malisimo

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were clean, but we wanted to change the baby and there was no changing table in the women's restroom. When we asked the employee if there was one in the accessible restroom (since it was locked), she very reluctantly replied, "I don't think so." Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dy1LZVJREAE
